title: Scaffold Firebase emulator config + Nx targets + app initialization

project.description: Name of the Angular app to wire (firebase.config.ts is generated under its src/app, and its serve target is wrapped to start the emulator suite).

workspaceName.description: Workspace name used to build the FALLBACK offline emulator project id (`demo-<name>`). tools/emulators.sh normally DERIVES its --project from the app's environment.ts (single source of truth); this is the fallback when no env file is found, and the demo id seeded into environment.ts / firebase.config.ts. Defaults to the project name. (Not written to .firebaserc — that's the Firebase CLI's responsibility.)

staging.description: Opt-in: also scaffold a first-class STAGING environment — environment.staging.ts (write-if-absent), a `staging` build configuration (swaps that env file in), and apphosting.staging.yaml (builds `--configuration=staging`) — so the workflow's `staging` App Hosting backend gets its own config/database instead of silently building prod's. Pairs with the `databaseId` field for same-project Firestore isolation. Default false.
